lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really, I'm new to town and wanted to get to know the locals.

lines.speaker: Bandit
lines.text: I'm too busy for chitchat. Come back if you have some business to discuss with us.

sections.title: After killing the Bandit Champion during The Feud quest

lines.speaker: Bandit
lines.text: You dog! You killed our champion and for that you will die!
